providers.subtitle: High-accuracy speech-to-text powered by OpenAI Whisper. Requires an OpenAI API key.
providers.setupHint: Enter your OpenAI API key to enable Whisper transcription.

providers.subtitle: Fast, real-time speech-to-text with streaming support. Requires a Deepgram API key.
providers.setupHint: Enter your Deepgram API key to enable speech-to-text.

providers.subtitle: Multimodal speech-to-text powered by Google Gemini. Requires a Gemini API key.
providers.setupHint: Enter your Gemini API key to enable Google Gemini transcription.
